meta.title: Top 20 Secure PLC Coding Practices
meta.description:
It began with Jake Brodsky's S4x20 session on tips and tricks he had learned in his long career with a water utility to improve the resiliency, maintenance and security of a PLC and the underlying physical process. Today, it results in the release of Version 1.0 of the Top 20 Secure PLC Coding Practices, see at https://plc-security.com, with one of the least restrictive licenses for use, distribution and modification you will ever see.

Two of the project leaders, Sarah Fluchs and Vivek Ponnada, joined Dale on the show to discuss the list and how it can be used.
